title: Aroma Naturals London Scented Tealight Candles Bag | 4 Hour Burn Time | Standard Size D3.77 x H1.45cm | Three Tone Coloured Wax & Aluminium Cups | Pack of 30 Tea Lights Scent (Soft Cotton)
features: 4-Hour Burn Time: Designed for a clean and steady burn, ideal for short relaxation sessions or evening ambiance.
Compact Standard Size: Each tealight measures φ37.7mm x 14.5mm, fitting all standard tealight holders and lanterns.
Soft Cotton Scent: A crisp gradient of white, pale white, and light grey, evoking the clean and airy feel of freshly laundered linens.
Three-Tone Coloured Wax: Beautiful three colour tones matching the fragrance profile for a stylish and elegant look.
Premium Scented Paraffin Wax: 3% fragrance concentration ensures a long-lasting aroma and weighing 10.8g per tealight, they are easy to use, store, and transport.
description: Enhance your home with the Aroma Naturals London Scented Tealight Candles, designed to fill your space with delightful aromas while providing a clean, even burn for up to 4 hours. These premium scented tealights are perfect for creating a calming ambiance, whether for a romantic dinner, spa relaxation, meditation, or daily home fragrance. Each high-quality paraffin wax tealight contains 3% fragrance concentration, ensuring a noticeable yet balanced scent throw. Encased in durable aluminium cups, they offer safe, mess-free burning and fit all standard tealight holders, lanterns, and centerpiece decorations. Available in 6 luxurious scent variations, these tealights are ideal for home décor, festive celebrations, or thoughtful gifts. ✔ Long-Lasting Fragrance – Crafted with 3% fragrance concentration, ensuring a pleasant and consistent scent throw. ✔ Elegant & Classic Look – Available in multiple wax colors, adding a touch of style to any space. ✔ Safe & Mess-Free Design – Encased in aluminium cups to prevent wax spills and provide easy handling. ✔ Perfect for Any Occasion – Suitable for romantic dinners, weddings, Christmas, Diwali, spa treatments, home décor, and relaxation. ✔ Available in 6 Beautiful Scents – Choose from Strawberry & Raspberry, Wild Roses, Vanilla Cream, Lavender Sage, Lemon Verbena, or Soft Cotton. These fragranced tealights create a warm and inviting atmosphere, making them an essential addition to any home.

specifications_table.Occasion: Christmas, Diwali, Halloween, Memorial Day, Wedding
